title.en: Spool groups in Grid + a group panel
title.fr: Groupes de bobines en Grille + panneau de groupe
title.es: Grupos de bobinas en Cuadrícula + panel de grupo
title.it: Gruppi di bobine in Griglia + pannello gruppo
title.zh: 网格视图的线轴分组 + 分组面板
title.pt: Grupos de bobinas na Grelha + painel de grupo
title.pt-pt: Grupos de bobinas na Grelha + painel de grupo
title.pl: Grupy szpul w widoku siatki + panel grupy

body.en: Identical spools also collapse in Grid view into one deck card. Clicking a group (Grid or Table) opens a side panel listing every spool, with a dashboard overview at the top.
body.fr: Les bobines identiques se regroupent aussi en vue Grille en une seule card empilée. Cliquer un groupe (Grille ou Table) ouvre un panneau listant chaque bobine, avec un tableau de bord en tête.
body.de: Identische Spulen werden auch im Raster zu einer Stapel-Karte zusammengefasst. Ein Klick auf eine Gruppe (Raster oder Tabelle) öffnet ein Seitenpanel mit allen Spulen und einer Übersicht oben.
body.es: Las bobinas idénticas también se agrupan en Cuadrícula en una sola tarjeta apilada. Al hacer clic en un grupo (Cuadrícula o Tabla) se abre un panel con todas las bobinas y un resumen arriba.
body.it: Le bobine identiche si raggruppano anche in Griglia in un'unica card impilata. Cliccando un gruppo (Griglia o Tabella) si apre un pannello con tutte le bobine e una panoramica in alto.
body.zh: 相同线轴在网格视图中也会合并为一张堆叠卡片。点击分组（网格或表格）会打开侧面板，列出每个线轴，顶部带有概览仪表盘。
body.pt: As bobinas idênticas também se agrupam na Grelha numa única ficha empilhada. Clicar num grupo (Grelha ou Tabela) abre um painel com todas as bobinas e um resumo no topo.
body.pt-pt: As bobinas idênticas também se agrupam na Grelha numa única ficha empilhada. Clicar num grupo (Grelha ou Tabela) abre um painel com todas as bobinas e um resumo no topo.
body.pl: Identyczne szpule zwijają się też w widoku siatki w jedną kartę-stos. Kliknięcie grupy (siatka lub tabela) otwiera panel z listą szpul i podsumowaniem u góry.

title.fr: Aperçu de groupe en temps réel
title.it: Panoramica del gruppo in tempo reale
title.pt: Resumo do grupo em tempo real
title.pt-pt: Resumo do grupo em tempo real

body.en: The group panel shows a speedometer gauge of the remaining filament, brand, material, combined weight and spool count — and the totals update in real time as you change a spool's weight from the slider or a scale.
body.fr: Le panneau de groupe affiche une jauge type compteur du filament restant, la marque, la matière, le poids cumulé et le nombre de bobines — et les totaux se mettent à jour en temps réel quand vous changez un poids via le curseur ou une balance.
body.de: Das Gruppenpanel zeigt eine Tacho-Anzeige des Restfilaments, Marke, Material, Gesamtgewicht und Spulenzahl — die Summen aktualisieren sich live, wenn Sie ein Gewicht per Regler oder Waage ändern.
body.es: El panel de grupo muestra un indicador tipo velocímetro del filamento restante, la marca, el material, el peso combinado y el número de bobinas; los totales se actualizan en vivo al cambiar un peso con el control o una báscula.
body.it: Il pannello del gruppo mostra un indicatore tipo tachimetro del filamento residuo, marca, materiale, peso combinato e numero di bobine — i totali si aggiornano in tempo reale quando cambi un peso dal cursore o da una bilancia.
body.zh: 分组面板以仪表盘显示剩余耗材，并展示品牌、材料、合计重量和线轴数量——当你通过滑块或电子秤更改重量时，合计会实时更新。
body.pt: O painel do grupo mostra um indicador tipo velocímetro do filamento restante, marca, material, peso combinado e número de bobinas — e os totais atualizam em tempo real ao mudar um peso pelo cursor ou por uma balança.
body.pt-pt: O painel do grupo mostra um indicador tipo velocímetro do filamento restante, marca, material, peso combinado e número de bobinas — e os totais atualizam em tempo real ao mudar um peso pelo cursor ou por uma balança.
body.pl: Panel grupy pokazuje wskaźnik (jak prędkościomierz) pozostałego filamentu oraz markę, materiał, łączną wagę i liczbę szpul — sumy aktualizują się na żywo, gdy zmieniasz wagę suwakiem lub wagą.

title.de: Halten, um alle Panels zu schließen

body.en: Press and hold any side panel's close tab for half a second to dismiss every open side card at once (a vertical fill shows the progress).
body.fr: Maintenez l'onglet de fermeture d'un panneau une demi-seconde pour fermer toutes les side cards ouvertes d'un coup (un remplissage vertical indique la progression).
body.de: Halten Sie den Schließen-Tab eines Seitenpanels eine halbe Sekunde gedrückt, um alle offenen Seitenkarten auf einmal zu schließen (eine vertikale Füllung zeigt den Fortschritt).
body.es: Mantén pulsada la pestaña de cierre de cualquier panel medio segundo para cerrar todas las tarjetas laterales abiertas a la vez (un relleno vertical muestra el progreso).
body.it: Tieni premuta la linguetta di chiusura di un pannello per mezzo secondo per chiudere tutte le schede laterali aperte in una volta (un riempimento verticale mostra l'avanzamento).
body.zh: 长按任意侧面板的关闭标签半秒，即可一次关闭所有打开的侧卡（垂直填充显示进度）。
body.pt: Mantenha premido o separador de fecho de qualquer painel meio segundo para fechar todos os cartões laterais abertos de uma vez (um preenchimento vertical mostra o progresso).
body.pt-pt: Mantenha premido o separador de fecho de qualquer painel meio segundo para fechar todos os cartões laterais abertos de uma vez (um preenchimento vertical mostra o progresso).
body.pl: Przytrzymaj zakładkę zamykania dowolnego panelu przez pół sekundy, aby zamknąć wszystkie otwarte karty boczne naraz (pionowe wypełnienie pokazuje postęp).

body.en: After each update, a floating window shows what's new in plain language — move it, resize it, and browse past versions. Reopen it anytime from Settings → About.
body.fr: Après chaque mise à jour, une fenêtre flottante présente les nouveautés en clair — déplaçable, redimensionnable, avec l'historique des versions. Rouvrable depuis Réglages → À propos.
body.de: Nach jedem Update zeigt ein frei bewegliches Fenster die Neuerungen in klarer Sprache — verschieben, vergrößern und frühere Versionen durchblättern. Jederzeit über Einstellungen → Über erreichbar.
body.es: Tras cada actualización, una ventana flotante muestra las novedades en lenguaje claro: muévela, cámbiale el tamaño y consulta versiones anteriores. Vuelve a abrirla desde Ajustes → Acerca de.
body.it: Dopo ogni aggiornamento, una finestra mobile mostra le novità in modo chiaro — spostala, ridimensionala e sfoglia le versioni precedenti. Riaprila da Impostazioni → Info.
body.zh: 每次更新后，一个可浮动窗口以通俗语言展示新功能——可移动、可调整大小，并可浏览历史版本。可随时从「设置 → 关于」重新打开。
body.pt: Após cada atualização, uma janela flutuante mostra as novidades em linguagem simples — mova-a, redimensione-a e consulte versões anteriores. Reabra em Definições → Acerca.
body.pt-pt: Após cada atualização, uma janela flutuante mostra as novidades em linguagem simples — mova-a, redimensione-a e consulte versões anteriores. Reabra em Definições → Acerca.
body.pl: Po każdej aktualizacji ruchome okno pokazuje nowości prostym językiem — przesuwaj je, zmieniaj rozmiar i przeglądaj poprzednie wersje. Otworzysz je ponownie w Ustawienia → Informacje.

body.en: Emojis across the app are now crisp SVG icons (or removed where purely decorative) for a more consistent, professional interface.
body.fr: Les emojis de l'application sont remplacés par des icônes SVG nettes (ou retirés là où ils étaient décoratifs) pour une interface plus cohérente et pro.
body.de: Emojis in der App sind jetzt klare SVG-Symbole (oder entfernt, wo sie nur Deko waren) — für eine einheitlichere, professionellere Oberfläche.
body.es: Los emojis de la app ahora son iconos SVG nítidos (o se han quitado donde eran decorativos) para una interfaz más coherente y profesional.
body.it: Gli emoji dell'app sono ora icone SVG nitide (o rimossi dove puramente decorativi) per un'interfaccia più coerente e professionale.
body.zh: 应用内的表情符号已替换为清晰的 SVG 图标（纯装饰性的则移除），界面更统一、更专业。
body.pt: Os emojis da app passam a ser ícones SVG nítidos (ou foram removidos onde eram decorativos) para uma interface mais coerente e profissional.
body.pt-pt: Os emojis da aplicação passam a ser ícones SVG nítidos (ou foram removidos onde eram decorativos) para uma interface mais coerente e profissional.
body.pl: Emoji w aplikacji to teraz wyraźne ikony SVG (lub usunięto je tam, gdzie były tylko ozdobą) — interfejs jest spójniejszy i bardziej profesjonalny.

title.fr: Les bobines cloud se regroupent aussi
title.es: Las bobinas en la nube también se agrupan
title.it: Anche le bobine cloud si raggruppano
title.zh: 云端线轴也会合并分组
title.pt: As bobinas na nuvem também se agrupam
title.pt-pt: As bobinas na nuvem também se agrupam
title.pl: Szpule w chmurze też się grupują

body.en: A TigerCloud spool and a TigerTag (Maker) spool of the same filament now collapse into the same group, instead of the cloud one staying on its own.
body.fr: Une bobine TigerCloud et une bobine TigerTag (Maker) du même filament se regroupent désormais ensemble, au lieu de laisser la cloud à part.
body.de: Eine TigerCloud-Spule und eine TigerTag-(Maker-)Spule desselben Filaments landen jetzt in derselben Gruppe, statt die Cloud-Spule allein zu lassen.
body.es: Una bobina TigerCloud y una bobina TigerTag (Maker) del mismo filamento ahora se agrupan juntas, en lugar de dejar la de la nube aparte.
body.it: Una bobina TigerCloud e una bobina TigerTag (Maker) dello stesso filamento ora finiscono nello stesso gruppo, invece di lasciare quella cloud da sola.
body.zh: 相同耗材的 TigerCloud 线轴与 TigerTag（Maker）线轴现在会合并到同一组，云端线轴不再单独显示。
body.pt: Uma bobina TigerCloud e uma bobina TigerTag (Maker) do mesmo filamento passam a ficar no mesmo grupo, em vez de a da nuvem ficar à parte.
body.pt-pt: Uma bobina TigerCloud e uma bobina TigerTag (Maker) do mesmo filamento passam a ficar no mesmo grupo, em vez de a da nuvem ficar à parte.
body.pl: Szpula TigerCloud i szpula TigerTag (Maker) z tego samego filamentu trafiają teraz do tej samej grupy, zamiast zostawiać chmurową osobno.

body.en: The "Set Color & TD Value" dialog can be dragged by its header to reposition it.
body.fr: La fenêtre « Set Color & TD Value » peut être déplacée en l'attrapant par sa barre de titre.
body.de: Der Dialog "Set Color & TD Value" lässt sich an seiner Titelleiste verschieben.
body.es: El diálogo "Set Color & TD Value" se puede arrastrar por su barra de título para recolocarlo.
body.it: La finestra "Set Color & TD Value" può essere spostata trascinandola dalla barra del titolo.
body.zh: 「Set Color & TD Value」对话框可通过标题栏拖动来重新摆放。
body.pt: A janela "Set Color & TD Value" pode ser arrastada pela barra de título para a reposicionar.
body.pt-pt: A janela "Set Color & TD Value" pode ser arrastada pela barra de título para a reposicionar.
body.pl: Okno "Set Color & TD Value" można przeciągać za pasek tytułu, aby zmienić jego położenie.

body.en: The inventory table can now fold identical spools into one expandable line with a count badge — a full shelf reads at a glance. Toggle it with the switch in the toolbar.
body.fr: Le tableau d'inventaire peut désormais regrouper les bobines identiques en une seule ligne dépliable avec un compteur — une étagère entière se lit d'un coup d'œil. Activez-le via l'interrupteur de la barre d'outils.
body.de: Die Bestandstabelle kann identische Spulen jetzt zu einer aufklappbaren Zeile mit Zähler zusammenfassen — ein ganzes Regal auf einen Blick. Über den Schalter in der Symbolleiste umschaltbar.
body.es: La tabla de inventario ahora agrupa las bobinas idénticas en una sola línea desplegable con un contador: un estante entero de un vistazo. Actívalo con el interruptor de la barra de herramientas.
body.it: La tabella dell'inventario può ora raggruppare le bobine identiche in un'unica riga espandibile con un contatore: un intero scaffale a colpo d'occhio. Attivalo dall'interruttore nella barra degli strumenti.
body.zh: 库存表格现在可将相同线轴合并为一行（带数量徽章），可展开查看——整架线轴一目了然。通过工具栏的开关切换。
body.pt: A tabela de inventário agora agrupa bobinas idênticas numa única linha expansível com um contador — uma prateleira inteira num relance. Ative pelo interruptor na barra de ferramentas.
body.pt-pt: A tabela de inventário passa a agrupar bobinas idênticas numa única linha expansível com um contador — uma prateleira inteira num relance. Ative no interruptor da barra de ferramentas.
body.pl: Tabela inwentarza może teraz zwijać identyczne szpule w jeden rozwijalny wiersz z licznikiem — cała półka na pierwszy rzut oka. Przełącz to przełącznikiem na pasku narzędzi.

body.en: The remaining-filament bar now turns red, orange or green depending on how much is left — matching the mobile app.
body.fr: La barre de filament restant passe au rouge, orange ou vert selon la quantité restante — comme dans l'app mobile.
body.de: Der Balken für das verbleibende Filament wird je nach Restmenge rot, orange oder grün — wie in der mobilen App.
body.es: La barra de filamento restante se vuelve roja, naranja o verde según lo que queda, igual que en la app móvil.
body.it: La barra del filamento residuo diventa rossa, arancione o verde in base a quanto resta — come nell'app mobile.
body.zh: 余量条会根据剩余量变为红色、橙色或绿色——与手机 App 一致。
body.pt: A barra de filamento restante fica vermelha, laranja ou verde conforme o que resta — igual à app móvel.
body.pt-pt: A barra de filamento restante fica vermelha, laranja ou verde consoante o que resta — tal como na aplicação móvel.
body.pl: Pasek pozostałego filamentu zmienia kolor na czerwony, pomarańczowy lub zielony zależnie od ilości — tak jak w aplikacji mobilnej.

title.zh: 更智能的"从 API 刷新"

body.en: Refreshing a TigerTag+ spool now also corrects its brand, material, finish, temperatures and colour from the catalogue. If the chip needs rewriting, the spool is flagged.
body.fr: Actualiser une bobine TigerTag+ corrige aussi sa marque, sa matière, son aspect, ses températures et sa couleur depuis le catalogue. Si la puce doit être réécrite, la bobine est signalée.
body.de: Beim Aktualisieren einer TigerTag+-Spule werden jetzt auch Marke, Material, Oberfläche, Temperaturen und Farbe aus dem Katalog korrigiert. Muss der Chip neu beschrieben werden, wird die Spule markiert.
body.es: Actualizar una bobina TigerTag+ ahora también corrige su marca, material, acabado, temperaturas y color desde el catálogo. Si hay que reescribir el chip, la bobina se marca.
body.it: Aggiornare una bobina TigerTag+ ora corregge anche marca, materiale, finitura, temperature e colore dal catalogo. Se il chip va riscritto, la bobina viene segnalata.
body.zh: 刷新 TigerTag+ 线轴现在还会从目录更正其品牌、材料、外观、温度和颜色。若芯片需要重写，该线轴会被标记。
body.pt: Atualizar uma bobina TigerTag+ agora também corrige a marca, material, acabamento, temperaturas e cor a partir do catálogo. Se o chip precisar de ser regravado, a bobina é sinalizada.
body.pt-pt: Atualizar uma bobina TigerTag+ passa a corrigir também a marca, material, acabamento, temperaturas e cor a partir do catálogo. Se o chip precisar de ser regravado, a bobina é sinalizada.
body.pl: Odświeżenie szpuli TigerTag+ poprawia teraz także markę, materiał, wykończenie, temperatury i kolor z katalogu. Jeśli chip wymaga ponownego zapisu, szpula zostaje oznaczona.

body.en: When a new version is downloading or ready, you'll see it in the notification bell — with a one-click Restart when it's ready.
body.fr: Quand une nouvelle version se télécharge ou est prête, vous la voyez dans la cloche de notifications — avec un bouton Redémarrer en un clic une fois prête.
body.de: Wenn eine neue Version geladen wird oder bereit ist, erscheint sie in der Benachrichtigungsglocke — mit Neustart per Klick, sobald sie bereit ist.
body.es: Cuando una nueva versión se descarga o está lista, la verás en la campana de notificaciones, con un botón Reiniciar de un clic cuando esté lista.
body.it: Quando una nuova versione si scarica o è pronta, la vedi nella campanella delle notifiche — con riavvio in un clic quando è pronta.
body.zh: 当新版本正在下载或已就绪时，你会在通知铃中看到——就绪后可一键重启。
body.pt: Quando uma nova versão está a transferir ou pronta, vê-la no sino de notificações — com Reiniciar num clique quando estiver pronta.
body.pt-pt: Quando uma nova versão está a ser transferida ou pronta, vê-la no sino de notificações — com Reiniciar num clique quando estiver pronta.
body.pl: Gdy nowa wersja się pobiera lub jest gotowa, zobaczysz to w dzwonku powiadomień — z restartem jednym kliknięciem, gdy będzie gotowa.

body.en: The Friends panel has a new "Share link" button — send the link anywhere and your friend just opens it to pre-fill the add-friend request (they still confirm).
body.fr: Le panneau Amis a un nouveau bouton « Partager le lien » — envoyez-le où vous voulez ; votre ami l'ouvre et la demande d'ajout est pré-remplie (il confirme quand même).
body.de: Das Freunde-Panel hat einen neuen Button "Link teilen" — verschicke ihn beliebig; dein Freund öffnet ihn und die Freundschaftsanfrage ist vorausgefüllt (er bestätigt weiterhin selbst).
body.es: El panel de Amigos tiene un nuevo botón "Compartir enlace": envíalo a donde quieras y tu amigo solo tiene que abrirlo para rellenar la solicitud (él confirma).
body.it: Il pannello Amici ha un nuovo pulsante "Condividi link" — invialo dove vuoi; il tuo amico lo apre e la richiesta di amicizia è precompilata (conferma lui).
body.zh: 好友面板新增"分享链接"按钮——随意发送，好友打开后即自动填好添加请求（仍需其确认）。
body.pt: O painel de Amigos tem um novo botão "Partilhar link" — envie-o para onde quiser e o seu amigo só precisa de abri-lo para preencher o pedido (ele confirma).
body.pt-pt: O painel de Amigos tem um novo botão "Partilhar link" — envie-o para onde quiser e o seu amigo só tem de abri-lo para preencher o pedido (ele confirma).
body.pl: Panel Znajomych ma nowy przycisk "Udostępnij link" — wyślij go gdziekolwiek; znajomy otwiera go, a prośba o dodanie jest już wypełniona (i tak potwierdza).

body.en: Friend avatars appear immediately in the add-friend preview, and accepting or dismissing a request or notification now clears it the instant you click.
body.fr: Les avatars d'amis s'affichent immédiatement dans l'aperçu, et accepter ou ignorer une demande ou une notification l'efface dès le clic.
body.de: Freunde-Avatare erscheinen sofort in der Vorschau, und das Annehmen oder Verwerfen einer Anfrage oder Benachrichtigung wirkt jetzt sofort beim Klick.
body.es: Los avatares de amigos aparecen de inmediato en la vista previa, y aceptar o descartar una solicitud o notificación la quita en el instante en que haces clic.
body.it: Gli avatar degli amici compaiono subito nell'anteprima e accettare o ignorare una richiesta o notifica la rimuove all'istante.
body.zh: 好友头像在预览中立即显示，接受或忽略请求/通知时点击即刻清除。
body.pt: Os avatares de amigos aparecem imediatamente na pré-visualização, e aceitar ou dispensar um pedido ou notificação remove-o assim que clica.
body.pt-pt: Os avatares de amigos aparecem imediatamente na pré-visualização e aceitar ou dispensar um pedido ou notificação remove-o assim que clica.
body.pl: Awatary znajomych pojawiają się od razu w podglądzie, a akceptacja lub odrzucenie prośby czy powiadomienia działa natychmiast po kliknięciu.

title.pt: Creality: controlos da máquina ao vivo
title.pt-pt: Creality: controlos da máquina ao vivo

body.en: Drive your Creality from the side panel — set nozzle, bed and chamber temperatures, jog and home the axes, disable the motors, and control the fans. The motion pad hides during a print to keep jobs safe.
body.fr: Pilotez votre Creality depuis le panneau latéral — réglez les températures buse, plateau et caisson, déplacez et orientez les axes, désactivez les moteurs et gérez les ventilateurs. Le pavé de mouvement se masque pendant une impression pour la protéger.
body.de: Steuere deine Creality über das Seitenpanel — Düsen-, Bett- und Kammertemperatur einstellen, Achsen verfahren und referenzieren, Motoren deaktivieren und Lüfter regeln. Das Bewegungsfeld wird während eines Drucks ausgeblendet.
body.es: Controla tu Creality desde el panel lateral: ajusta las temperaturas de boquilla, cama y cámara, mueve y haz home de los ejes, desactiva los motores y controla los ventiladores. El panel de movimiento se oculta durante una impresión.
body.it: Pilota la tua Creality dal pannello laterale — imposta le temperature di ugello, piano e camera, muovi e azzera gli assi, disattiva i motori e gestisci le ventole. Il pad di movimento si nasconde durante una stampa.
body.zh: 在侧面板直接操控 Creality——设置喷嘴、热床和腔室温度，移动和归零各轴，关闭电机并控制风扇。打印期间隐藏移动面板以保护作业。
body.pt: Comande a sua Creality pelo painel lateral — defina temperaturas de bico, mesa e câmara, mova e faça home dos eixos, desative os motores e controle as ventoinhas. O painel de movimento oculta-se durante uma impressão.
body.pt-pt: Comande a sua Creality pelo painel lateral — defina temperaturas de bico, base e câmara, mova e faça home dos eixos, desative os motores e controle as ventoinhas. O painel de movimento esconde-se durante uma impressão.
body.pl: Steruj Creality z panelu bocznego — ustaw temperatury dyszy, stołu i komory, przesuwaj i bazuj osie, wyłącz silniki i steruj wentylatorami. Panel ruchu chowa się podczas druku.

title.fr: Creality : slots de filament et CFS
title.es: Creality: ranuras de filamento y CFS
title.pt: Creality: ranhuras de filamento e CFS
title.pt-pt: Creality: ranhuras de filamento e CFS

body.en: Pick a filament slot to feed or unload it through the CFS (auto heat, cut and feed). Slots show identified, loaded and empty states, and RFID-identified slots are locked against accidental edits.
body.fr: Sélectionnez un slot de filament pour le charger ou le décharger via le CFS (chauffe, coupe et charge automatiques). Les slots affichent les états identifié, chargé et vide, et les slots identifiés par RFID sont verrouillés contre les modifications accidentelles.
body.de: Wähle einen Filament-Slot, um ihn über das CFS zu laden oder zu entladen (automatisch heizen, schneiden, fördern). Slots zeigen die Zustände erkannt, geladen und leer; RFID-erkannte Slots sind gegen versehentliche Änderungen gesperrt.
body.es: Selecciona una ranura de filamento para cargarla o descargarla por el CFS (calienta, corta y alimenta solo). Las ranuras muestran los estados identificada, cargada y vacía, y las identificadas por RFID quedan bloqueadas ante ediciones accidentales.
body.it: Seleziona uno slot filamento per caricarlo o scaricarlo tramite il CFS (riscalda, taglia e alimenta in automatico). Gli slot mostrano gli stati identificato, caricato e vuoto; quelli identificati via RFID sono bloccati da modifiche accidentali.
body.zh: 选择一个料槽，通过 CFS 进料或退料（自动加热、剪切、送料）。料槽显示已识别、已装载和空三种状态，RFID 识别的料槽锁定以防误改。
body.pt: Selecione uma ranhura de filamento para carregar ou descarregar pelo CFS (aquece, corta e alimenta automaticamente). As ranhuras mostram os estados identificada, carregada e vazia, e as identificadas por RFID ficam bloqueadas contra edições acidentais.
body.pt-pt: Selecione uma ranhura de filamento para carregar ou descarregar pelo CFS (aquece, corta e alimenta automaticamente). As ranhuras mostram os estados identificada, carregada e vazia, e as identificadas por RFID ficam bloqueadas contra edições acidentais.
body.pl: Wybierz slot filamentu, aby załadować go lub wysunąć przez CFS (automatyczne grzanie, cięcie i podawanie). Sloty pokazują stany: zidentyfikowany, załadowany i pusty, a sloty rozpoznane przez RFID są zablokowane przed przypadkową edycją.

body.en: A new bell in the sidebar (with an unread badge) gathers your incoming friend requests and updates in one place. Friend requests shown there are actionable — Accept / Decline / Block — and stay until you choose one, so a request is never…

title.en: Friend requests are easier to handle

body.en: Pending requests now also appear in the Friends panel and the notification center (not just the popup), each showing the requester's real avatar with Accept / Decline / Block.
Accepting or removing a friend now appears instantly for both people without reopening the panel, and a friend's avatar / name / colour changes show up live too.
now shows your number of friends (or a "+" when you have none) instead of the pending-request count — requests moved to the bell.

: added a close () button to dismiss it for later (the request stays pending and can be handled from the bell or Friends panel), and it now shows the requester's real avatar immediately — no initials flash.

The Anycubic printer panel now has a Files button that opens a browser for the printer's stored files. Browse on-printer storage and a USB stick (the USB tab appears once a stick is detected), and — for cloud-connected printers — a Cloud…
The printer list, grid, and the "add a printer" picker now show each manufacturer's logo (Bambu Lab, Anycubic, Creality, Elegoo, FlashForge, Snapmaker).

A printer's online/offline state is now a small coloured dot next to its name — pulsing green when online, flat grey when offline — in both the grid and the side panel. The old "Online / Offline" badge has been removed as redundant.
The printers list and grid now show when each printer was last seen online ("just now" while connected, otherwise how long ago), and it's remembered across restarts.
The filament and printer tables now keep your last sort column and direction across restarts. By default filaments sort by Brand and printers by status (online first).
The printers table now has the same rounded, scrollable finish — with a pinned header — as the filament table.

The FlashForge side panel now shows per-nozzle temperatures (tool-changers like the Creator 5 Pro list each tool T1…Tn with the active one highlighted; single-nozzle models show E1), plus bed and — on enclosed models — chamber, each as…

title.en: FlashForge Creator 5 / 5 Pro: official colour palette

body.en: Setting a filament slot's colour now offers only the printer's 24 built-in "Color Library" swatches — the firmware silently rejects anything else (the slot reverts to white) — so every pick is one the printer actually keeps. Other models…

Printers with two heads (H2C / H2D / X2D) now show both nozzles — tagged R (right) and L (left), with the active head highlighted — each with its own temperature you can tap to set, instead of only the active head.

title.en: Filament colour/material editor no longer opens hidden behind the printer panel

body.en: A recent layering change had pushed the printer side-panel above the edit sheet; the sheet now sits above it again. Affects all brands (Snapmaker / Creality / Elegoo / FlashForge).

title.en: FlashForge temperatures and fans are read-only

body.en: — the firmware doesn't expose a command to set them, so they're shown for monitoring only.

The cloud (Agora) camera shows in the camera wall and the detached camera window too, not just the printer's side panel, and it keeps streaming through long sessions (automatic RTC-token refresh). Thanks to @ennisj (PR #4).

On models with an actively heated chamber (X1E, the H2 series, X2D), the chamber temperature is now a setpoint you can tap to set — like the nozzle and bed. Passive-chamber models (X1C) stay read-only.

title.en: Bambu Lab AMS humidity & temperature now show for every AMS unit

body.en: Machines with more than one AMS (e.g. the H2C, which has two) previously showed nothing; each unit's real humidity % and temperature now appear (labelled A / B / … when there are several). AMS Lite has no sensor and stays blank.
Printers connected in cloud mode now show their live camera in the side panel (an Agora WebRTC stream), not just LAN-connected printers. Thanks to @ennisj (PR #3).

title.en: Adding a printer opens its panel automatically

body.en: Once you finish adding a printer, its side-card now opens straight away instead of leaving you on the list.

title.en: Closing a printer also closes its settings

body.en: If a printer's Settings form was open, closing the printer now closes that form too — no leftover panel floating on the side.

title.en: Settings close tab no longer hidden

body.en: With a spool card, a printer's Settings, and a printer panel all open side by side, the spool card painted over the Settings panel's close tab — the tab is now always reachable.

title.en: Bambu Lab: full machine controls in the printer panel

body.en: The Bambu side-card now has the same live controls as the other brands — pause / resume / stop the current print, jog the X/Y/Z axes, home any axis, toggle the chamber light, disable the motors, set nozzle and bed target temperatures…

Both models are now recognised. Network discovery and "Add by IP" read the printer's serial number automatically, and the exact model is detected on first connection so the correct name and picture appear without picking them by hand. The…

title.en: Bambu Lab: smoother, flicker-free live cards

body.en: The printer card no longer rebuilds itself every time the printer sends an update — only the values that actually changed are refreshed. Editing a field (temperature, a dropdown…) is no longer interrupted when new data arrives, and the…

title.en: Printer settings open beside the printer card

body.en: Opening a printer's settings (gear) now slides the form in next to the printer panel instead of hidden behind it, without dimming the rest of the app, and it has the same » close tab as the other side-cards. Switching to another printer…

title.en: Bambu Lab: correct AMS humidity & temperature

body.en: The A1's AMS Lite has no humidity/temperature sensor, so it no longer shows made-up values. On AMS units that do have a sensor (AMS HT, AMS 2 Pro), humidity now shows the real percentage instead of the internal 1–5 dryness grade, and the…

title.en: FlashForge: newer models are no longer dropped during discovery

body.en: Printers that don't reveal their identity to the first probe (e.g. Creator 5) now appear in the scan and can be set up via "Add by IP".

title.en: Spool and printer side-cards no longer dim the screen

body.en: Opening a spool's or printer's detail card used to drop a dark overlay behind it that you had to dismiss first. Now the list stays fully usable — click another spool or printer and the card switches in place, no close-then-reselect. Each…

title.en: Spool and printer cards can now sit side by side

body.en: Open a spool's card and a printer's card at the same time and the printer keeps the right edge while the spool card tucks in just to its left (passing neatly behind it), instead of one replacing the other — groundwork for dragging a spool…

title.en: Buttons no longer jump down when clicked

body.en: Some buttons — most visibly the show/hide-password eye — shifted downward on press. Fixed everywhere.

title.en: Spool card's close tab now slides behind the printer card

body.en: When both cards were open and you closed the spool card, its orange » tab briefly swept in front of the printer card instead of behind it like the card itself. Fixed.

title.en: Anycubic Kobra X: live camera now works (LAN)

body.en: The Kobra X's camera is now supported over the local network, reusing the same video pipeline as the Kobra 3 V2 — it was previously left off because the Kobra X advertises its stream differently. Thanks to @ennisj (PR #2).

When the printer refuses a command (for example "Home the axis before moving" if you jog before homing), an alert now pops up with the printer's message and error code, so you know why nothing happened.

title.en: Anycubic (cloud): the fan, temperatures and speed mode now work at any time

body.en: — not only while a print is running. They were previously sent in a way the printer only applied to an active job, so at idle nothing happened. They now use the same realtime channel as the official slicer.

title.en: Anycubic (cloud): the light now turns on the right LED

body.en: It was toggling the camera light (which the printer rejects); it now controls the chamber/part light.

title.en: Anycubic: editing a nozzle/bed temperature is fixed

body.en: The input no longer errors out, and clicking away now applies the value (Escape still cancels).

title.en: Bambu Lab: adding a printer by IP now works reliably

body.en: Typing your printer's IP could fail with "No reply from …" even when the printer was online and reachable — the check gave up too quickly before the printer finished answering. It now waits long enough, and it also fills in the serial…

title.en: Bambu Lab camera is smoother and more responsive

body.en: on RTSP models (X1C, X1E, P2S, H2x…). The live view now runs at 30 fps instead of 5 and starts almost instantly — the several-second delay before the first image is gone.

title.en: Bambu Lab camera no longer gets stuck on a black screen / spinner

body.en: on A1, A1 Mini, P1P and P1S. It now reconnects on its own after a printer reboot, a Wi-Fi drop or a slow start, and gives up quickly (a few seconds instead of up to a minute) when the camera port is blocked or unreachable.

title.en: Bambu Lab: the camera stays off when you disable it on the printer

body.en: If you turn the LAN camera off from the printer's own screen, the app no longer keeps trying to open it.

title.en: Anycubic: setting a nozzle or bed temperature no longer closes the input

body.en: The value field used to close every time the printer sent a status update; it now stays open while you type.

title.en: Anycubic (cloud): the job preview thumbnail no longer flickers

body.en: It no longer reloads on every refresh — the preview stays steady.

title.en: Printer Table view: print progress, status and "Updated" now refresh live

body.en: The table used to stay frozen until you clicked Refresh; each row now updates on its own (progress %, remaining time, online status). Affects Bambu Lab, Creality, FlashForge and Snapmaker.

title.en: Anycubic control panel now works in cloud mode too

body.en: Homing, jogging, disabling the motors, the light, nozzle/bed temperatures, the fan, the speed mode and pause/resume/stop now reach cloud-connected printers (they previously only worked over the local network). Temperature, fan, speed and…

title.en: Anycubic: editing a filament slot no longer flickers

body.en: When changing a slot's material or colour, the square briefly flashed back to the old value before settling on the new one. It now switches once, cleanly.

title.en: Anycubic cloud mode now works everywhere — including macOS and Linux

body.en: Adding a cloud printer used to need a Windows-only trick (running the slicer in a special debug mode); now you just click Sign in to Anycubic Cloud, log in on Anycubic's own page in a pop-up window, and your cloud printers appear. Once…

title.en: Anycubic (cloud): no longer stuck on "Idle" at the start of a print

body.en: While the printer was auto-levelling before the first layer, the card wrongly showed "Idle"; it now shows "Preparing" until printing begins.

— the 6th brand, alongside Bambu Lab, Creality, Elegoo, FlashForge and Snapmaker. Connect over your local network or through Anycubic's cloud (a mixed fleet works in one list), see the ACE multi-colour box and its slots, set a slot's…

— drive a connected Anycubic printer straight from its side card, like Snapmaker and Elegoo: home the axes (XYZ / XY / Z) or disable the motors to move them by hand, jog X/Y/Z by 1 / 10 / 50 mm, set the nozzle and bed targets, toggle the…

Each ACE slot now reflects its real state: a present spool keeps its colour, while an empty (not-mounted) slot shows a grey “?” with the colour kept as an outline so it stays recognisable, and the material name still shows underneath. From…

title.en: Bambu Lab camera: smoother, lower-latency video

body.en: The camera stream now carries frames as raw binary instead of Base64 text — that removes image-encoding work from the app's main thread (which also handles the printer connection) and shrinks the data passed around internally, so the…

title.en: Locked storage slots now have two clear states

body.en: Locking an *empty* slot marks it as unusable — it gets a grey hatched look and is removed from the rack's available capacity (so 130/198 becomes 130/197). Locking a *filled* slot pins the material in place — it keeps the spool's colour…

Camera frames are now coalesced to one repaint per frame instead of piling up when the app is busy, which removes the stutter bursts on the printer camera view (P2S, H2C, X1 and the rest of the RTSP range, plus the JPEG models).
in the container picker: Anycubic masterspool (Black, 218 g) and DEEPLEE cardboard spool (Standard, 143 g).

anonymous usage statistics now track spool-lifecycle counts over time (how many TigerCloud / TigerTag / TigerTag+ spools are created, and conversions between them). No personal data, no IP geolocation — same privacy-preserving, aggregate…

title.en: Encoding a custom or third-party spool no longer resets it on the next scan

body.en: When you wrote a tag for a custom spool — or a spool from another manufacturer — and then read it again, the spool reverted to the generic cardboard container and its weight changed back to the value stored on the chip. The app now keeps…

title.en: The app now opens already populated — like Discord or Slack

body.en: On launch, your inventory, your friends and your avatar appear in the very first frame, painted instantly from the previous session's local cache; the live data from the server then merges on top silently, repainting only what actually…

A small TigerTag splash with the logo and the app version shows the instant you open the app, and the main window only appears once it's ready to display fully — no more watching the interface assemble itself piece by piece.

title.en: Your sidebar friends list now scrolls

body.en: when you have more friends than fit on screen, with no visible scrollbar (Discord-style). The avatar, the Refresh / Friends buttons and the community footer stay fixed in place.

title.en: No more flickering avatars on launch

body.en: Your avatar in the inventory header and your friends' avatars in the sidebar used to flash / reload 2–3 times on every cold start. They now paint once and stay put.

title.en: No more "loading shine" sweeping across every image

body.en: A shimmer animation used to glide left-to-right over every image while it loaded (avatars, inventory, printers). Since images now load instantly from the local cache, that effect was removed — images simply appear.

title.en: Your initials can no longer show behind or beside your avatar photo,

body.en: and the "+" sign-in badge can no longer leak next to your initials. The avatar now always shows exactly one of: the "+" (signed out), your initials (no photo), or your photo — never a mix.

title.en: No more flicker on app open — your avatar (and your friends' avatars) now appear in the very first frame

body.en: Previously the sidebar avatar went through "empty circle wrong letter from your email real letter from your name photo" on every cold start, and the friends list in the sidebar dropdown showed up empty until Firestore round-tripped. Now…

title.en: No more "B" or random wrong letter in your avatar circle

body.en: Before this fix, until Firestore loaded your display name, the avatar fell back to the first letter of your email address — so for benoit@… the sidebar briefly showed a "B" in your colour, then jumped to your real "OM" (or whatever your…

title.en: No more Google placeholder photo overwriting your custom avatar

body.en: A long-standing bug was overwriting your uploaded avatar with Google's auto-generated profile picture (the "letter on coloured circle" you see when a Google account has no photo) on every sign-in. If you saw a stranger letter / colour…

title.en: No more "+" badge bleeding next to your initials

body.en: A CSS specificity bug was causing the "sign in" plus-icon to show next to your initials in the sidebar avatar when you were already signed in.

title.en: Avatar upload on Windows 10 now opens the crop modal reliably

body.en: A race between the file-picker's focus and change events on Windows 10's I/O scheduler was silently resolving the picker with no file, so the crop modal never opened and the upload silently failed. Switched to the modern cancel event for…

All eight places in the UI that show a coloured-circle avatar (sidebar, the "OM" header chip, dropdown, profile-management modal, edit-account modal, sidebar friend chips, friends panel, friend-view header) now go through a single…

title.en: Custom profile picture — upload your own avatar

body.en: The colour-circle + initials avatar everywhere in Studio (sidebar, top "OM" header chip, edit-account modal, account dropdown, profiles modal, friends list, friends panel, friend banner when previewing a friend's inventory) now shows your…

title.en: No more flashes or disappearing grid on the built-in Retina display

body.en: On a MacBook's built-in Retina screen in full-screen, opening a spool side card used to make the grid flicker, lose its cards, or leave the side card as a blank rectangle — every interaction in the inventory area would trigger another wave…

title.en: Open the connection tutorial straight from the printer settings

body.en: The pencil/configure panel for a Bambu Lab, FlashForge or Elegoo printer now has a " Tutoriel de connexion" button at the top — for the moment you realise you skipped the tutorial during the scan and still need to find the access code or…

title.en: Scan results show the printer photo

body.en: A FlashForge tile in the scan results now shows the printer's product photo on the left, like the mobile app — easier to recognise your AD5X vs your 5M Pro at a glance.

title.en: One shared "extra subnets" list across every brand, synced to your account

body.en: The Power-user "Autres réseaux à scanner" widget that appeared inside Snapmaker, Creality, Elegoo and FlashForge now also appears in Bambu Lab, and the list is the same one everywhere — declared once, honoured by every scan. The list is…

title.en: FlashForge LAN scan finds printers on routed subnets again

body.en: If your FlashForge sits on a different /24 than your Mac (typical multi-VLAN home network), Studio now finds it the same way the mobile app does. Three small fixes stack: the probe now talks to the printer's TCP ~M115 identity endpoint as…

title.en: Connection tutorial in the printer settings now follows the selected model

body.en: Was always opening the same tutorial regardless of the model dropdown — most visible on Bambu Lab where 11 models share 3 different tutorials.

title.en: Printer connection tutorials, brought over from the mobile app

body.en: Connecting a Bambu Lab — LAN-only mode, developer mode, IP + serial + access code — takes seven steps and a lot of context. The mobile app already walked users through it; the desktop app now does too. Open the Add Printer panel, and any…

title.en: Printer table sorts by status by default

body.en: Open the Printers view as Tableau and the connected printers come up first, offline ones at the bottom. Click any column header to sort differently, like before.
Removed the grey rectangle behind the printer photo in the Printers Grille view — the photo now sits directly on the card.

title.en: Auto-update is now more robust against transient GitHub outages

body.en: The app was hitting GitHub with the old project URL (TigerTag_Studio_Manager, with underscores) and relying on GitHub to silently redirect to the canonical URL (TigerTag-Studio-Manager, with hyphens). Every check therefore made two…

title.en: New "Balance" weight input mode for kitchen-scale users

body.en: Open the spool detail panel, click the pencil next to the weight, and a small Net / Balance toggle now sits next to the / buttons. In Balance mode you type the value your scale shows (filament + container); Studio subtracts the container…

title.en: Saving a weight no longer reloads the side panel

body.en: Editing the weight from the slider or the manual input used to flash the product image, the "Mettre à jour le RFID" banner, the TigerTag SVG badges, and every other icon for a fraction of a second because the panel rebuilt itself after…

title.en: The verbose green save toast is gone

body.en: Instead of " N g disponibles (G g − C g contenant) · jumeau mis à jour" sitting under the weight bar for a full second, a small green check now pops to the right of the "POIDS" section title and gently fades out. The new value is already…

title.en: The weight slider waits for you to actually release before saving to the cloud

body.en: Pausing mid-drag for half a second (still holding the slider) used to burn a Firestore write at every pause; now the write only fires once you release the thumb, and re-grabbing the slider within 500 ms cancels the pending request. Fewer…

title.en: If someone else edits the same spool while you're dragging, the server wins

body.en: If your phone — or another logged-in device — updates the weight on the same spool while you have the desktop slider held down, the slider now releases your grip and snaps to the value that just arrived from the cloud (and your pending…

title.en: Container card layout — the container name now sits in the same column as "Customizable" and the weight in grams

body.en: , beside the container thumbnail, instead of sitting on its own line above the card.

title.en: Spool detail side panel no longer flashes when something else changes in Firestore

body.en: Editing a different spool — from the mobile app, from another device, or even just a write echo coming back — used to tear down and rebuild the entire side panel, flashing the product photo and every SVG icon (badges, twin link, chip…

title.en: Cold start is now instant from cache

body.en: Tiger Studio now stores every Firestore snapshot in a local IndexedDB cache, so on the next launch your inventory, racks and printers appear immediately — even before the network round-trip completes — and the app stays usable when…

title.en: Product thumbnails no longer flash on view switches

body.en: Cached product images are now served as proper HTTP responses from the local app server instead of being inlined as base64 data URLs. The browser keeps the decoded bitmap alive across DOM operations, so clicking Grid, opening the detail…

title.en: Filaments Grid and Table views no longer flash when one spool changes

body.en: Editing a single field on a spool — moving the weight slider, picking a container, linking a twin, changing the color — used to flash the whole Filaments view because every card or row was destroyed and rebuilt from scratch on every…

title.en: Printer Grid view: the per-printer job block (state pill, progress bar, filename) stops rebuilding on every brand poll tick when nothing actually changed

body.en: FlashForge polls every 2 seconds, Bambu every 5, Elegoo every 10 — and the job block was being destroyed and re-created on every one of those, even when the printer was idle or offline. Now the block is only touched when state, progress…

title.en: Filaments Grid and Table views no longer flash on every search keystroke

body.en: Typing in the search bar with the Filaments view open (in Grid mode or Table mode) used to flash the whole view at every letter — every spool card or row was destroyed and rebuilt from scratch, and every had to be re-decoded by the…

title.en: Printer Grid view no longer refreshes constantly when printers are offline

body.en: Every printer reconnect retry (every 2 to 30 seconds, per printer) used to rebuild the whole printer grid — every card image was destroyed and re-decoded, producing a visible refresh flash several times per minute on a 10-printer setup…

title.en: Storage view no longer flashes on every search keystroke or rack hover

body.en: Typing in the search bar with the Storage view open used to flash the whole grid at every letter, and sweeping the mouse between racks that both contained search matches produced a visible flash too — most noticeably on large inventories…

title.en: Contextual "+ Add Rack" inside the "Spools not stored" side panel

body.en: When you have more unstored spools than free slots — i.e. you actually need more rack capacity — an orange-accented CTA appears right inside the side panel with a short explanation. Hidden when there's still room to drag spools into…

title.en: "+ Add Rack" moved into the main header

body.en: The small "+ New Rack" tile that lived inside the rack stats bar is gone — the standard header "Add" button (which says "Add Product" in inventory views and "Add Device" in printer views) now says "Add Rack" when you're in Storage, and…

title.en: Storage stats no longer count ghost spools

body.en: Both the global header (filled / total slots, free) and the per-rack header (filled/total) used to include any spool that still had a rackId set — even if the rack had been deleted or the spool's level/position were out of bounds. That…

title.en: Deleting a rack now fully unassigns the spools that were inside it

body.en: The old code only nulled the new-style rack field, leaving the legacy flat rack_id / level / position fields intact — so the spool stayed ghost-assigned to a rack that no longer existed and silently inflated the storage stats. Both shapes…

title.en: Cam view empty state was showing raw key names

body.en: ("camWallEmptyTitle" / "camWallEmptySub") instead of localized text after switching back and forth between Cam and Printer Grid. The two missing translations were added across all 9 locales — the empty state now reads "No cameras online —…

title.en: Bambu Lab and Elegoo printers now show up in the network scan

body.en: *Add printer Bambu Lab Scan network* discovers Bambu printers via SSDP — they announce themselves on the LAN, no setup needed. *Add printer Elegoo Scan network* discovers Elegoo printers (Centauri Carbon 2 and later) by sending a quick UDP…

title.en: Storage view: the hover tooltip on a rack slot now shows the spool's material image

body.en: as a full-height left column (for TigerTag+ spools that have a product photo). The bubble keeps everything that was already there — brand, material, color, weight bar, coordinate, lock indicator — on the right. Falls back to the previous…

title.en: Printers are reported online only once the connection is really established

body.en: — i.e. after the first real frame/report/heartbeat arrives — not the instant the network socket opens. Previously Snapmaker and Creality flipped to "online" the moment the WebSocket connected, and Bambu / Elegoo the moment the MQTT broker…

title.en: Elegoo: the MQTT credential field is now required and properly named

The small-caps "Credentials" section header and the horizontal divider line between sections are gone across all brands. The form now reads as one continuous block of connection fields instead of looking like several separate cards stacked…

title.en: Read-only mode in a friend's inventory hides the write-action buttons

body.en: The *+ Scan* and *Add* buttons no longer appear when you're viewing a friend's inventory — they can't act on someone else's collection anyway. They reappear automatically when you return to your own view.

title.en: Creality printers now show up in the network scan

body.en: — *Add printer Creality Scan network* discovers Creality machines on your LAN (K-series, K2, and current-gen Enders running Klipper, e.g. the Ender-3 V4) and adds them in one click, just like Snapmaker and FlashForge. There's also a manual…

title.en: Adding a Creality printer no longer requires a username/password

body.en: — the *Root* account and password fields are now optional. Most Creality printers expose their control channel without authentication, so you can add and connect to them without entering anything; only fill them in if your printer's…

title.en: A friend's inventory is cleaner in read-only mode

body.en: — when viewing a friend's inventory, the *+ Scan* and *Add* buttons are now hidden, since those actions can't apply to someone else's collection.

title.en: Bambu RTSP cameras (X1C / X1E / P2S / H2x) now actually stream

body.en: — the camera launched ffmpeg with -tls_verify 0, an option the bundled ffmpeg doesn't recognise, so it errored out and showed nothing as soon as it reached a reachable printer. Removed the flag — TLS verification is off by default, so the…

title.en: Bambu RTSP cameras (X1C / X1E / P2S / H2x) now actually work on Windows

title.en: 3D-printer RTSP cameras now work on Windows

body.en: (Bambu X1C / X1E / P2S / H2x) — ffmpeg is now bundled with the app on every platform, so the live camera works out of the box with nothing extra to install. Previously Windows had no ffmpeg available, so the RTSP camera stayed disabled.

title.en: Update notification tooltip showed raw HTML

title.en: Encode modal (TigerCloud TigerTag) — cleaner and safer

title.en: Pick a container in a side panel
title.fr: Choisir un contenant dans un panneau latéral
title.es: Elige un contenedor en un panel lateral
title.it: Scegli un contenitore in un pannello laterale
title.zh: 在侧边面板中选择容器
title.pt: Escolha um recipiente num painel lateral
title.pt-pt: Escolha um recipiente num painel lateral

body.en: 'Choose a container' is no longer a pop-up — it slides in beside the spool, with bigger container images and the weight shown under each type.
body.fr: « Choisir un contenant » n'est plus une fenêtre — il glisse à côté de la bobine, avec des images de contenants plus grandes et le poids affiché sous chaque type.
body.de: „Behälter wählen“ ist kein Pop-up mehr – es schiebt sich neben die Spule, mit größeren Behälterbildern und dem Gewicht unter jedem Typ.
body.es: «Elegir un contenedor» ya no es una ventana emergente: se desliza junto a la bobina, con imágenes de contenedor más grandes y el peso bajo cada tipo.
body.it: «Scegli un contenitore» non è più una finestra pop-up: scorre accanto alla bobina, con immagini dei contenitori più grandi e il peso sotto ogni tipo.
body.zh: “选择容器”不再是弹窗——它会滑出到线材旁边，容器图片更大，重量显示在每个类型下方。
body.pt: «Escolher um recipiente» já não é uma janela — desliza ao lado da bobina, com imagens de recipiente maiores e o peso mostrado sob cada tipo.
body.pt-pt: «Escolher um recipiente» já não é uma janela — desliza ao lado da bobina, com imagens de recipiente maiores e o peso mostrado sob cada tipo.
body.pl: „Wybierz pojemnik“ nie jest już wyskakującym okienkiem — wysuwa się obok szpuli, z większymi obrazami pojemników i wagą pod każdym typem.

body.en: Cleaner buttons and hover states, the Debug panel now opens neatly beside Settings, and the inventory Refresh now lives discreetly in Settings → Data.
body.fr: Des boutons et survols plus nets, le panneau Debug s'ouvre proprement à côté des Réglages, et le rafraîchissement de l'inventaire se trouve désormais discrètement dans Réglages → Données.
body.de: Sauberere Schaltflächen und Hover-Effekte, das Debug-Panel öffnet sich jetzt sauber neben den Einstellungen, und die Inventar-Aktualisierung sitzt nun dezent unter Einstellungen → Daten.
body.es: Botones y estados de hover más limpios, el panel de Depuración ahora se abre junto a Ajustes, y la actualización del inventario está ahora discretamente en Ajustes → Datos.
body.it: Pulsanti e stati hover più puliti, il pannello Debug ora si apre accanto alle Impostazioni e l'aggiornamento dell'inventario si trova ora discretamente in Impostazioni → Dati.
body.zh: 按钮和悬停效果更简洁，调试面板现在会整齐地在设置旁边打开，库存刷新现在低调地放在 设置 → 数据 中。
body.pt: Botões e estados de hover mais limpos, o painel de Depuração agora abre ao lado das Definições, e a atualização do inventário fica agora discretamente em Definições → Dados.
body.pt-pt: Botões e estados de hover mais limpos, o painel de Depuração agora abre ao lado das Definições, e a atualização do inventário fica agora discretamente em Definições → Dados.
body.pl: Czytelniejsze przyciski i stany najechania, panel Debugowania otwiera się teraz schludnie obok Ustawień, a odświeżanie magazynu znajduje się dyskretnie w Ustawienia → Dane.

title.en: A permanent shelf for unstored spools
title.fr: Une étagère permanente pour les bobines non rangées
title.de: Ein festes Regal für nicht eingelagerte Spulen
title.es: Un estante fijo para bobinas sin almacenar
title.it: Uno scaffale fisso per le bobine non riposte
title.zh: 未入库线材的固定货架
title.pt: Uma prateleira fixa para bobinas não armazenadas
title.pt-pt: Uma prateleira fixa para bobinas não armazenadas

body.en: In Storage, the “not stored” panel is now a fixed column that's always visible — a clear bin for spools that aren't in a rack. Drop a rack spool onto it to take it out, and an empty zone shows exactly where to drop.
body.fr: Dans Rangement, le panneau « non rangées » est désormais une colonne fixe toujours visible — un bac clair pour les bobines hors rack. Déposez-y une bobine d'un rack pour l'en sortir ; une zone vide indique où déposer.
body.de: Im Lager ist das „nicht eingelagert“-Panel jetzt eine feste, immer sichtbare Spalte — ein klarer Behälter für Spulen außerhalb eines Regals. Lege eine Regalspule darauf ab, um sie herauszunehmen; eine leere Zone zeigt, wo.
body.es: En Almacenamiento, el panel «sin almacenar» es ahora una columna fija siempre visible: un contenedor claro para bobinas fuera de un rack. Suelta una bobina de un rack para sacarla; una zona vacía indica dónde soltar.
body.it: In Archiviazione, il pannello «non riposte» ora è una colonna fissa sempre visibile — un contenitore chiaro per le bobine fuori da uno scaffale. Trascinaci una bobina per toglierla; una zona vuota mostra dove rilasciare.
body.zh: 在存储视图中，“未入库”面板现在是始终可见的固定列——存放不在货架上线材的清晰容器。把货架上的线材拖到这里即可取出，空白区域会提示放置位置。
body.pt: Em Armazenamento, o painel «não armazenadas» é agora uma coluna fixa sempre visível — um recipiente claro para bobinas fora de um rack. Largue aí uma bobina de um rack para a retirar; uma zona vazia mostra onde largar.
body.pt-pt: Em Armazenamento, o painel «não armazenadas» é agora uma coluna fixa sempre visível — um recipiente claro para bobinas fora de um rack. Largue aí uma bobina de um rack para a retirar; uma zona vazia mostra onde largar.
body.pl: W Magazynie panel „nieschowane” jest teraz stałą, zawsze widoczną kolumną — czytelnym pojemnikiem na szpule spoza regału. Upuść na niego szpulę z regału, aby ją wyjąć; pusta strefa pokazuje, gdzie upuścić.

body.en: The two Grid/Table button groups are now labelled Materials and Printers, so it's obvious which one switches your filament inventory and which one switches your printers.
body.fr: Les deux groupes de boutons Grille/Table sont désormais étiquetés Matériaux et Imprimantes : on voit tout de suite lequel change l'inventaire des filaments et lequel change les imprimantes.
body.de: Die beiden Raster/Tabelle-Gruppen sind jetzt mit Materialien und Drucker beschriftet — so ist klar, welche das Filament-Inventar und welche die Drucker umschaltet.
body.es: Los dos grupos de botones Cuadrícula/Tabla ahora están etiquetados como Materiales e Impresoras, así se ve cuál cambia el inventario de filamento y cuál las impresoras.
body.it: I due gruppi di pulsanti Griglia/Tabella ora sono etichettati Materiali e Stampanti, così è chiaro quale cambia l'inventario dei filamenti e quale le stampanti.
body.zh: 两组“网格/表格”按钮现在分别标注为“材料”和“打印机”，一眼就能看出哪个切换耗材库存、哪个切换打印机。
body.pt: Os dois grupos de botões Grelha/Tabela estão agora identificados como Materiais e Impressoras, por isso vê-se logo qual muda o inventário de filamento e qual muda as impressoras.
body.pt-pt: Os dois grupos de botões Grelha/Tabela estão agora identificados como Materiais e Impressoras, por isso vê-se logo qual muda o inventário de filamento e qual muda as impressoras.
body.pl: Dwie grupy przycisków Siatka/Tabela mają teraz etykiety Materiały i Drukarki, więc od razu wiadomo, która przełącza magazyn filamentu, a która drukarki.

title.fr: Rangement et déstockage auto plus malins
title.zh: 更智能的自动入库与移出

body.en: With Auto storage on, a rack's “Clear all” is hidden and dropping a spool in the bin simply turns Auto storage off so it stays. With Auto unstorage on, empty (0 g) spools are locked in the bin with a tooltip, since they can't be stored anyway.
body.fr: Avec Auto storage activé, le « Clear all » d'un rack est masqué et déposer une bobine dans le bac désactive simplement Auto storage pour qu'elle y reste. Avec Auto unstorage activé, les bobines vides (0 g) sont verrouillées dans le bac avec une info-bulle, puisqu'elles ne peuvent de toute façon pas être rangées.
body.de: Bei aktivem Auto-Einlagern wird „Alle leeren“ eines Regals ausgeblendet, und eine Spule in den Behälter zu legen schaltet Auto-Einlagern einfach aus, damit sie bleibt. Bei aktivem Auto-Auslagern sind leere (0 g) Spulen im Behälter mit Tooltip gesperrt, da sie ohnehin nicht eingelagert werden können.
body.es: Con Auto-almacenamiento activado, el «Vaciar todo» de un rack se oculta y soltar una bobina en el contenedor simplemente desactiva Auto-almacenamiento para que se quede. Con Auto-desalmacenamiento activado, las bobinas vacías (0 g) quedan bloqueadas en el contenedor con un tooltip, ya que no se pueden almacenar.
body.it: Con Auto-archiviazione attiva, lo «Svuota tutto» di uno scaffale è nascosto e rilasciare una bobina nel contenitore disattiva semplicemente Auto-archiviazione così resta. Con Auto-rimozione attiva, le bobine vuote (0 g) sono bloccate nel contenitore con un tooltip, dato che non possono comunque essere riposte.
body.zh: 开启自动入库时，货架的“清空全部”会隐藏，把线材放入容器会直接关闭自动入库以便保留。开启自动移出时，空（0 克）线材会在容器中被锁定并带提示，因为它们本来也无法入库。
body.pt: Com Auto-armazenamento ligado, o «Limpar tudo» de um rack fica oculto e largar uma bobina no recipiente desliga simplesmente o Auto-armazenamento para que fique. Com Auto-remoção ligada, as bobinas vazias (0 g) ficam bloqueadas no recipiente com uma dica, já que não podem ser armazenadas.
body.pt-pt: Com Auto-armazenamento ligado, o «Limpar tudo» de um rack fica oculto e largar uma bobina no recipiente desliga simplesmente o Auto-armazenamento para que fique. Com Auto-remoção ligada, as bobinas vazias (0 g) ficam bloqueadas no recipiente com uma dica, já que não podem ser armazenadas.
body.pl: Przy włączonym auto-przechowywaniu „Wyczyść wszystko” w regale jest ukryte, a upuszczenie szpuli do pojemnika po prostu wyłącza auto-przechowywanie, by tam została. Przy włączonym auto-usuwaniu puste (0 g) szpule są zablokowane w pojemniku z podpowiedzią, bo i tak nie można ich schować.

title.fr: Prise en charge de la Bambu Lab A2L
title.es: Compatibilidad con la Bambu Lab A2L
title.pt: Suporte para a Bambu Lab A2L
title.pt-pt: Suporte para a Bambu Lab A2L

body.en: The new Bambu Lab A2L is now in the printer catalog, so you can add and track it.
body.fr: La nouvelle Bambu Lab A2L est désormais au catalogue des imprimantes : vous pouvez l'ajouter et la suivre.
body.de: Die neue Bambu Lab A2L ist jetzt im Druckerkatalog — du kannst sie hinzufügen und verfolgen.
body.es: La nueva Bambu Lab A2L ya está en el catálogo de impresoras, para añadirla y seguirla.
body.it: La nuova Bambu Lab A2L è ora nel catalogo stampanti: puoi aggiungerla e monitorarla.
body.zh: 新的 Bambu Lab A2L 已加入打印机目录，可添加并跟踪。
body.pt: A nova Bambu Lab A2L já está no catálogo de impressoras, para a adicionar e acompanhar.
body.pt-pt: A nova Bambu Lab A2L já está no catálogo de impressoras, para a adicionar e acompanhar.
body.pl: Nowa Bambu Lab A2L jest już w katalogu drukarek — możesz ją dodać i śledzić.

body.en: Auto storage and Auto unstorage are now one switch: new spools are auto-placed and emptied slots are auto-freed. Lock a slot to keep an exception. Saved per account and synced across devices.
body.fr: Auto storage et Auto unstorage ne font plus qu'un : les nouvelles bobines se rangent toutes seules et les slots vidés se libèrent. Verrouillez un slot pour une exception. Enregistré par compte et synchronisé entre appareils.
body.de: Auto-Einlagern und Auto-Auslagern sind jetzt ein Schalter: neue Spulen werden automatisch eingelagert, leere Plätze automatisch freigegeben. Sperre einen Platz für eine Ausnahme. Pro Konto gespeichert und geräteübergreifend synchronisiert.
body.es: Auto-almacenamiento y Auto-desalmacenamiento ahora son un solo interruptor: las bobinas nuevas se colocan solas y los huecos vacíos se liberan. Bloquea un hueco para una excepción. Se guarda por cuenta y se sincroniza entre dispositivos.
body.it: Auto-archiviazione e Auto-rimozione ora sono un solo interruttore: le nuove bobine si posizionano da sole e gli slot vuoti si liberano. Blocca uno slot per un'eccezione. Salvato per account e sincronizzato tra dispositivi.
body.zh: 自动入库和自动移出现在合为一个开关：新线材自动放置，空槽位自动释放。锁定槽位可设例外。按账户保存并跨设备同步。
body.pt: Auto-armazenamento e Auto-remoção são agora um só botão: as bobinas novas colocam-se sozinhas e os slots vazios libertam-se. Bloqueie um slot para uma exceção. Guardado por conta e sincronizado entre dispositivos.
body.pt-pt: Auto-armazenamento e Auto-remoção são agora um só botão: as bobinas novas colocam-se sozinhas e os slots vazios libertam-se. Bloqueie um slot para uma exceção. Guardado por conta e sincronizado entre dispositivos.
body.pl: Auto-przechowywanie i auto-usuwanie to teraz jeden przełącznik: nowe szpule układają się same, a puste miejsca zwalniają. Zablokuj miejsce, aby zrobić wyjątek. Zapisywane per konto i synchronizowane między urządzeniami.

body.en: Creality fans are now cards with −/+ 10% steppers, matching the other printers — one card per fan your printer actually has.
body.fr: Les ventilateurs Creality sont désormais des cartes avec des boutons −/+ 10 %, comme les autres imprimantes — une carte par ventilateur réellement présent.
body.de: Creality-Lüfter sind jetzt Karten mit −/+ 10 %-Tasten, wie bei den anderen Druckern — eine Karte pro tatsächlich vorhandenem Lüfter.
body.es: Los ventiladores Creality ahora son tarjetas con botones −/+ 10 %, como las demás impresoras: una tarjeta por cada ventilador que tiene la impresora.
body.it: Le ventole Creality ora sono schede con pulsanti −/+ 10 %, come le altre stampanti — una scheda per ogni ventola realmente presente.
body.zh: Creality 风扇现在是带 −/+ 10% 按钮的卡片，与其他打印机一致——打印机实际拥有的每个风扇一张卡片。
body.pt: Os ventiladores Creality são agora cartões com botões −/+ 10 %, como as outras impressoras — um cartão por cada ventilador que a impressora tem.
body.pt-pt: Os ventiladores Creality são agora cartões com botões −/+ 10 %, como as outras impressoras — um cartão por cada ventilador que a impressora tem.
body.pl: Wentylatory Creality to teraz karty z przyciskami −/+ 10%, jak w innych drukarkach — jedna karta na każdy wentylator, który drukarka faktycznie ma.

title.fr: Barre d'outils et vue Cam épurées
title.es: Barra y vista Cam más ordenadas
title.it: Barra e vista Cam più ordinate
title.zh: 更整洁的工具栏与摄像头视图
title.pt: Barra e vista Cam mais arrumadas
title.pt-pt: Barra e vista Cam mais arrumadas

body.en: The Materials / Printers view switcher now sits above the search bar everywhere, the “not stored” header is more compact, and the Cam view hides the search and add buttons (Detach moved up).
body.fr: Le sélecteur de vue Matériaux / Imprimantes est désormais au-dessus de la barre de recherche partout, l'en-tête « non rangées » est plus compact, et la vue Cam masque la recherche et les boutons d'ajout (Detach remonté).
body.de: Der Ansichtswechsler Materialien / Drucker sitzt jetzt überall über der Suchleiste, der „nicht eingelagert“-Kopf ist kompakter, und die Cam-Ansicht blendet Suche und Hinzufügen-Tasten aus (Detach nach oben).
body.es: El selector de vista Materiales / Impresoras está ahora sobre la barra de búsqueda en todas partes, el encabezado «sin almacenar» es más compacto y la vista Cam oculta la búsqueda y los botones de añadir (Detach subido).
body.it: Il selettore vista Materiali / Stampanti ora è sopra la barra di ricerca ovunque, l'intestazione «non riposte» è più compatta e la vista Cam nasconde la ricerca e i pulsanti di aggiunta (Detach spostato in alto).
body.zh: 材料 / 打印机视图切换器现在在各处都位于搜索栏上方，“未入库”标题更紧凑，摄像头视图隐藏了搜索和添加按钮（分离按钮上移）。
body.pt: O seletor de vista Materiais / Impressoras fica agora acima da barra de pesquisa em todo o lado, o cabeçalho «não armazenadas» é mais compacto e a vista Cam oculta a pesquisa e os botões de adicionar (Detach subido).
body.pt-pt: O seletor de vista Materiais / Impressoras fica agora acima da barra de pesquisa em todo o lado, o cabeçalho «não armazenadas» é mais compacto e a vista Cam oculta a pesquisa e os botões de adicionar (Detach subido).
body.pl: Przełącznik widoku Materiały / Drukarki znajduje się teraz wszędzie nad paskiem wyszukiwania, nagłówek „nieschowane“ jest bardziej zwarty, a widok kamery ukrywa wyszukiwanie i przyciski dodawania (Detach przeniesiony w górę).

body.en: Switching between accounts while using the automation could clear spools from your racks. That's fixed — and a spool in a locked slot now always stays put.
body.fr: Changer de compte en utilisant l'automatisation pouvait vider des bobines de vos racks. C'est corrigé — et une bobine dans un slot verrouillé y reste toujours.
body.de: Beim Kontowechsel während der Automatisierung konnten Spulen aus den Regalen verschwinden. Das ist behoben — und eine Spule in einem gesperrten Platz bleibt jetzt immer dort.
body.es: Cambiar de cuenta usando la automatización podía vaciar bobinas de tus racks. Se ha corregido, y una bobina en un hueco bloqueado ahora siempre se queda.
body.it: Cambiare account mentre si usa l'automazione poteva svuotare bobine dai tuoi scaffali. È stato corretto — e una bobina in uno slot bloccato ora resta sempre al suo posto.
body.zh: 在使用自动整理时切换账户可能会清空货架上的线材。此问题已修复——锁定槽位中的线材现在始终保留。
body.pt: Trocar de conta enquanto usava a automação podia esvaziar bobinas dos teus racks. Foi corrigido — e uma bobina num slot bloqueado fica agora sempre no lugar.
body.pt-pt: Trocar de conta enquanto usava a automação podia esvaziar bobinas dos teus racks. Foi corrigido — e uma bobina num slot bloqueado fica agora sempre no lugar.
body.pl: Przełączanie kont podczas korzystania z automatyzacji mogło usuwać szpule z regałów. Naprawione — a szpula w zablokowanym miejscu zawsze pozostaje na miejscu.
